task_completion.description: Upload the five specified photographs to the WordPress Media Library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the WordPress Media Library or the 'Add Media'/'Insert Gallery' modal containing the five new images (city skyline, street market, bridge, historic building, park fountain).

task_completion.description: Assign the specific alt text to each uploaded image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Attachment Details' pane in the Media Library or the block settings sidebar with the 'Alternative Text' field filled out with the exact required phrases for the corresponding images.

task_completion.description: Create a new page titled 'Urban Photography Portfolio'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress page editor showing 'Urban Photography Portfolio' in the main title block.

task_completion.description: Add the specific introductory text to the page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress page editor showing a paragraph block containing the exact text: 'A curated collection of urban photography capturing the beauty of city life, architecture, and public spaces.'

task_completion.description: Add a gallery containing all five images to the page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the WordPress page editor showing a Gallery block that visually displays all five uploaded photographs.
Screenshots showing the 'Publish' button being clicked, a 'Page published' confirmation notification, or the live frontend view of the published page.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the WordPress GUI in Firefox.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Firefox browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard, rather than terminal windows executing wp-cli commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual image files rather than linking external URLs or using placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The media library upload process or file picker dialog should be visible, showing files being selected from the local ~/Photos/ directory.

integrity.description: The text content was entered into the actual WordPress block editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The introductory text and title should be visible inside the WordPress Gutenberg editor blocks, not just in a local text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Page Title: 'Urban Photography Portfolio'. Expected Page Type: page. Expected Status: publish. Expected Intro Text: 'A curated collection of urban photography capturing the beauty of city life, architecture, and public spaces.'. Expected Images and Alt Texts: 'city-skyline.jpg' -> 'City skyline at golden hour', 'street-market.jpg' -> 'Busy street market with vendors', 'bridge-sunset.jpg' -> 'Historic bridge during sunset', 'historic-building.jpg' -> '19th century stone building facade', 'park-fountain.jpg' -> 'Ornamental fountain in city park'.
